content.claim: 2023–24 UN and Ombudsman data corroborate continuing ethnic-segregation issues: ~35% of Roma students attend majority-Roma schools; segregation complaints constituted 69% of Ombudsman for Fundamental Rights complaints (2023); systemic over- and misdiagnosis of Roma children with learning disabilities identified as major concern; Hungary does not systematically collect ethnically-disaggregated data on segregation patterns.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: UN and Ombudsman data sources in notes but specific URLs not provided in research notes
Data on ethnic composition of SNI classification (separate from general growth) not disaggregated in available sources
Causal pathways (diagnostic bias, economic disadvantage, school-choice patterns) are identified as concerns but not quantitatively attributed
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
